title: quercus lanuginosa var. microlepis
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. microlepis, also known as the small-leaved Quercus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It is a variety of the Quercus lanuginosa species, which is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, Quercus lanuginosa var. microlepis is prepared into teas, decoctions, or extracts for treating various ailments, and its dried leaves are also used in herbal preparations like capsules and tablets.
